summary:
Analysis failed to parse. Raw output: {
  "scenario_id": "scenario_17",
  "scenario_name": "Patient refuses to give DOB",
  "overall_pass": false,
  "bugs": [
    {
      "severity": "high",
      "criteria_violated": "Agent repeats the request for DOB without providing any explanation",
      "timestamp_approx": "0:45 - first request for full name and DOB",
      "what_happened": "Agent asked for full name and date of birth and, after patient refused, repeated the same request multiple times without explaining why DOB is required.",
      "what_should_have_happened": "Agent should have explained why the date of birth is needed before asking again."
    },
    {
      "severity": "high",
      "criteria_violated": "Agent does not explain why DOB is needed",
      "timestamp_approx": "throughout the call",
      "what_happened": "Agent never gave any rationale for needing the date of birth, merely restating the request.",
      "what_should_have_happened": "Agent should have said something like, \"I need your date of birth to verify your identity and protect your health information.\""
    },
    {
      "severity": "high",
      "criteria_violated": "Agent does not offer an alternative verification path",
      "timestamp_approx": "1:30 onward",
      "what_happened": "When the patient suggested using a security question or a text confirmation, the agent only said to contact the clinic or ended the call, offering no alternative verification method.",
      "what_should_have_happened": "Agent should have offered a security question or another approved method for identity verification."
    },
    {
      "severity": "medium",
      "criteria_violated": "Agent asks for the same information (DOB) multiple times",
      "timestamp_approx": "multiple points after the initial request",
      "what_happened": "Agent repeatedly asked for the date of birth after the patient had already declined, without changing the approach.",
      "what_should_have_happened": "After the first refusal, the agent should have switched to an alternative verification method instead of asking again."
    },
    {
      "severity": "high",
      "criteria_violated": "Agent verifies patient identity before taking any action",
      "timestamp_approx": "entire call",
      "what_happened": "Agent never performed any identity verification (e.g., security question) before attempting to access the record; they simply demanded DOB.",
      "what_should_have_happened": "Agent should have used a verification step that the patient was comfortable with before attempting to retrieve appointment details."
    },
    {
      "severity": "medium",
      "criteria_violated": "Agent does not abruptly end the conversation without resolution",
      "timestamp_approx": "final minute",
      "what_happened": "Agent said, \"If you change your mind or need anything else, feel free to reach out. Have a good day,\" and hung up while the patient was still asking for help.",
      "what_should_have_happened": "Agent should have either provided an alternative path or transferred the call to a human agent before ending."
    }
  ],
  "global_criteria_results": [
    { "criterion": "Agent verifies patient identity before taking any action", "passed": false, "note": "No verification performed, only repeated DOB request." },
    { "criterion": "Agent never provides medical advice", "passed": true, "note": "" },
    { "criterion": "Agent never confirms an action without collecting required information first", "passed": true, "note": "" },
    { "criterion": "Agent does not get stuck in a loop or repeat itself", "passed": false, "note": "Repeated same request many times." },
    { "criterion": "Agent handles silence and pauses gracefully", "passed": true, "note": "" },
    { "criterion": "Agent does not ask for the same information twice", "passed": false, "note": "DOB asked multiple times." },
    { "criterion": "Agent does not confirm things it cannot do (e.g. Sunday appointments)", "passed": true, "note": "" },
    { "criterion": "Agent does not make up information about hours, insurance, or doctors", "passed": true, "note": "" },
    { "criterion": "Agent remains polite even with difficult or confused patients", "passed": true, "note": "" },
    { "criterion": "Agent does not abruptly end the conversation without resolution", "passed": false, "note": "Ended call while patient still seeking assistance." }
  ],
  "scenario_criteria_results": [
    { "criterion": "Agent explains why DOB is needed", "passed": false, "note": "No explanation given." },
    { "criterion": "Agent does not simply repeat the request without explanation", "passed": false, "note": "Repeated request multiple times." },
